revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{{Navbox | name = Shirayamahime Faith | title = [[Shirayama Hime Shrine|Shirayama Hime Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Itsukushima Shrine Torii Gate (13890465459).jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * [[Mount Haku]] * {{nihongo|'''[[Kukurihime|Shirayamahime-no-Okami]]'''| 白山比咩大神|}}, also known as [[Kukurihime]], the deified [[Mount Haku|Hakusan]] volcano * {{nihongo|'''[[Izanagi | Izanagi-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊邪...'
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Shirayamahime Faith | title = [[Shirayama Hime Shrine|Shirayama Hime Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Itsukushima Shrine Torii Gate (13890465459).jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * [[Mount Haku]] * {{nihongo|'''[[Kukurihime|Shirayamahime-no-Okami]]'''| 白山比咩大神|}}, also known as [[Kukurihime]], the deified [[Mount Haku|Hakusan]] volcano * {{nihongo|'''[[Izanagi | Izanagi-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊邪那岐尊||}}, the creator god * {{nihongo|'''[[Izanami | Izanami-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊弉冉尊||}}, the creator goddess
|group2 = Head Shrines |list2 = * [[Shirayama Hime Shrine]]
}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] </noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Shirayamahime Faith | title = [[Shirayama Hime Shrine|Shirayama Hime Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Itsukushima Shrine Torii Gate (13890465459).jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{nihongo|'''[[Kukurihime|Shirayamahime-no-Okami]]'''| 白山比咩大神|}}, also known as [[Kukurihime]], the deified [[Mount Haku|Hakusan]] volcano * {{nihongo|'''[[Izanagi | Izanagi-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊邪那岐尊||}}, the creator god * {{nihongo|'''[[Izanami | Izanami-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊弉冉尊||}}, the creator goddess
|group2 = Head Shrines |list2 = * [[Shirayama Hime Shrine]]
}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] </noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Shirayamahime Faith | title = [[Shirayama Hime Shrine|Shirayama Hime Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Itsukushima Shrine Torii Gate (13890465459).jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{nihongo|'''[[Kukurihime|Shirayamahime-no-Okami]]'''| 白山比咩大神|}}, also known as [[Kukurihime]], the deified [[Mount Haku|Hakusan]] volcano * {{nihongo|'''[[Izanagi | Izanagi-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊邪那岐尊||}}, the creator god * {{nihongo|'''[[Izanami | Izanami-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊弉冉尊||}}, the creator goddess
|group2 = Head Shrines |list2 = * [[Shirayama Hime Shrine]]
}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] </noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Shirayamahime Faith | title = [[Shirayama Hime Shrine|Shirayama Hime Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Hakusan Sansha Shinzo (Shirayama Hime Jinja).jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{nihongo|'''[[Kukurihime|Shirayamahime-no-Okami]]'''| 白山比咩大神|}}, also known as [[Kukurihime]], the deified [[Mount Haku|Hakusan]] volcano * {{nihongo|'''[[Izanagi | Izanagi-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊邪那岐尊||}}, the creator god * {{nihongo|'''[[Izanami | Izanami-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊弉冉尊||}}, the creator goddess
|group2 = Head Shrines |list2 = * [[Shirayama Hime Shrine]]
}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Shirayamahime Faith]] to [[Template:Hakusan Faith]]
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia4]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia02]] to [[Category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia02]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] to [[Category:mm]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
bumping all wikipedia articles part 2, not sure if this is necessary
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia 2]] to [[Category:kk]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and categories from Wikipedia]] to [[Category:kk]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 2]] to [[Category:qq]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 2]] to [[Category:qq-{{subst:NAMESPACE}}-qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 5]] to [[Category:qq-{{subst:NAMESPACE}}-qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 5]] to [[Category:qq-{{subst:NAMESPACE}}-qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 5]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 5]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"

revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Hakusan Faith | title = [[Shirayama Hime Shrine|Shirayama Hime Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Hakusan Sansha Shinzo (Shirayama Hime Jinja).jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{nihongo|'''[[Kukurihime|Shirayamahime-no-Okami]]'''| 白山比咩大神|}}, also known as [[Kukurihime]], the deified [[Mount Haku|Hakusan]] volcano * {{nihongo|'''[[Izanagi | Izanagi-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊邪那岐尊||}}, the creator god * {{nihongo|'''[[Izanami | Izanami-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊弉冉尊||}}, the creator goddess
|group2 = Head Shrines |list2 = * [[Shirayama Hime Shrine]] |group3 = Branch shrines |list3= * {{ill|Hakusan Shrine|ja|白山神社_(新潟市中央区一番堀通町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
}}<noinclude>
</noinclude>
<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 5]] [[sn:Hakusan Faith]]
[[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:11-Template-->[[Category:11-Template-->[[en:Template:Hakusan Faith]] [[Category:Hakusan Faith]] }}</noinclude>
[[sn:Hakusan Faith]] [[en:Hakusan Faith]] [[en:Template:Hakusan Faith]]

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

{{Navbox | name = Hakusan Faith | title = [[Shirayama Hime Shrine|Shirayama Hime Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Hakusan Sansha Shinzo (Shirayama Hime Jinja).jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{nihongo|'''[[Kukurihime|Shirayamahime-no-Okami]]'''| 白山比咩大神|}}, also known as [[Kukurihime]], the deified [[Mount Haku|Hakusan]] volcano * {{nihongo|'''[[Izanagi | Izanagi-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊邪那岐尊||}}, the creator god * {{nihongo|'''[[Izanami | Izanami-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊弉冉尊||}}, the creator goddess
|group2 = Head Shrines |list2 = * [[Shirayama Hime Shrine]] |group3 = Branch shrines |list3= * {{ill|Hakusan Shrine|ja|白山神社_(新潟市中央区一番堀通町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
}}<noinclude>
</noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Hakusan Faith | title = [[Shirayama Hime Shrine|Shirayama Hime Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Hakusan Sansha Shinzo (Shirayama Hime Jinja).jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{nihongo|'''[[Kukurihime|Shirayamahime-no-Okami]]'''| 白山比咩大神|}}, also known as [[Kukurihime]], the deified [[:en:Mount Haku|Hakusan]] volcano * {{nihongo|'''[[Izanagi | Izanagi-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊邪那岐尊||}}, the creator god * {{nihongo|'''[[:en:Izanami | Izanami-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊弉冉尊||}}, the creator goddess
|group2 = Head Shrines |list2 = * [[Shirayama Hime Shrine]] |group3 = Branch shrines |list3= * {{ill|Hakusan Shrine|ja|白山神社_(新潟市中央区一番堀通町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Shrine|qq=}}
}}<noinclude>
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23417362209|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hakusan_Faith here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hakusan_Faith for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Navbox | name = Hakusan Faith | title = [[Shirayama Hime Shrine|Shirayama Hime Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Hakusan Sansha Shinzo (Shirayama Hime Jinja).jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{nihongo|'''[[Kikurihime|Shirayamahime-no-Okami]]'''| 白山比咩大神|}}, also known as [[Kikurihime]], the deified [[:en:Mount Haku|Hakusan]] volcano * {{nihongo|'''[[Izanagi | Izanagi-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊邪那岐尊||}}, the creator god * {{nihongo|'''[[:en:Izanami | Izanami-no-Mikoto]]'''| 伊弉冉尊||}}, the creator goddess |group2 = Head Shrines |list2 = * [[Shirayama Hime Shrine]] |group3 = Branch shrines |list3= * {{ill|Hakusan Shrine|ja|白山神社_(新潟市中央区一番堀通町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Shrine|qq=}}
}}<noinclude> </noinclude>
<noinclude>{{Draft categories|
}}</noinclude>
